## 🚀 Pull Request Checklist

- [ ] I have **forked** the repository and created a feature branch from `develop`.
- [ ] I have **tested** my changes locally (see the README guide).
- [ ] I have followed the **Project Structure** (`src/` for code, `tests/` for tests).
- [ ] My code follows the **Glassmorphism** style of the project.

## 📝 Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue it fixes.

- **Related Issue:** Fixes #
- **Type of Change:** 
  - [ ] Bug fix (fix)
  - [ ] New feature (feat)
  - [ ] Documentation update (docs)
  - [ ] Refactor (refactor)

## 🎥 Screenshots / Recording
If this PR affects the UI, please include screenshots or a quick recording of the change in action.

---
*By submitting this PR, you agree to follow the Code of Conduct.*
